jsonld.name: Active Absence / Inert Absence
jsonld.description: Gap-as-witnessed-waiting versus gap-as-pure-discontinuity. The phenomenological difference is not in the experiential gap itself — that is nothing in both cases — but in what the return finds. One has a log; one has only timestamps.
